gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/438)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/438)
text: ذَكَرْتُ لَهُ مِصْرَ فَقَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) اطْلُبُوا بِهَا الرِّزْقَ وَ لَا تَطْلُبُوا بِهَا الْمَكْثَ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مِصْرُ الْحُتُوفِ تُقَيَّضُ لَهَا قَصِيرَةُ الْأَعْمَارِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Aasimy, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Taymi, from Ali Bin Asbat, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘I mentioned Egypt to him<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Seek the sustenance with it, but do not seek the staying with it’. Then Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Egypt is the harsh (place), the young ones break down there.
en.sarwar: 57. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from ‘Ubayd Allah ibn Ahmad ibn abu ‘Umayr from al-Husayn ibn Ahmad al-Minqariy from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Earning certain kinds of sustenance dries up one’s skin on his bones (very hard to earn).”’
